title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
